---
title: "Lab 2 — Documenting Code and Data"
---

# Lab 2 — Documenting Code and Data

**Read first:** Chapters 5–6 (Documenting Code and Data; Documentation Fundamentals).

{{< include ../../assignments/assignment_02.qmd >}}

## AI and me

1. How did AI **support** you in this lab?
2. How did AI **fail** you?
3. How did AI **extend** you?
